tools.name: about.getAbout
tools.description:
Metadata about this API: version number, release date and available languages.

Metadata requests are NOT billed.

tools.name: ec.getEc
tools.description:
The entropy calculator - alias ec -, analyzes a password and calculates its entropy.

Entropy calculator requests are billed.
